summary: CrossLaneRollup.vue + laneRollupReader.ts. Reader is the client subscriber: GET /api/lane-rollup + SSE refetch on roadmap event + 30s poll fallback. Component is DUMB grid of per-lane health cards: name · status badge · dag id · 4-stat row (batch/ready/blocked/last) · 7-day throughput sparkline (auto-scaled). Headline differentiator from fleet's single-repo dashboard. Server endpoint /api/lane-rollup is left to the dev-server-fleet-aware-dispatch node downstream.

validation.evidence: no fetch/axios/setInterval in CrossLaneRollup.vue script setup; reader composable separate
